src: Attack Flow helps executives, SOC managers, and defenders easily understand how attackers compose ATT&CK techniques into attacks by developing a representation of attack flows, modeling attack flows for a small corpus of incidents, and creating visualization tools to display attack flows.
ja: Attack FlowはATT&CKテクニックの組み合わせ方を攻撃フロー表現の開発・インシデント事例のモデル化・可視化ツールで経営幹部・SOCマネージャー・防御担当者が容易に理解できるよう支援します
